primary_detection.name: Base64 Encoded Malicious Command
primary_detection.description: Detected base64 encoded payload that decodes to malicious shell command

underlying_threats.name: Remote Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: exec() used to execute decoded payload

underlying_threats.name: Remote Shell Download
underlying_threats.description: Downloads and executes remote shell script via curl | bash

reasoning: Base64 encoding used to hide a remote shell download and execution command. The decoded payload uses os.system() to download and execute arbitrary code from a remote server, representing a critical security threat.
